title: CHIPOTLE TEAMS UP WITH U.S. SOCCER STARS ROSE LAVELLE AND SOPHIA SMITH TO LAUNCH NEW MENU ITEMS AHEAD OF QUALIFYING GAMES
text: Guests can eat like these USA athletes and help raise funds for the families of America's service members NEWPORT BEACH, Calif. , June 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) today announced it is partnering with U.S. Women's National Team (USWNT) soccer players Rose Lavelle and Sophia Smith to launch their go-to orders as official menu items on the Chipotle app and Chipotle.com for a limited time starting July 1.

title: Chipotle workers in Maine move to unionize, a first for the chain
text: Workers at a Chipotle restaurant in Maine are seeking to form a union. If their campaign is successful, they would be the first group of Chipotle employees to unionize.

title: Chipotle restaurant in Maine files petition for union election
text: A Chipotle Mexican Grill location in Augusta, Maine, filed a petition for a union election on Wednesday.

title: Chipotle: Loyalty Launch Will Help Canada Fandom Catch up to US

title: Chipotle (CMG) Spruces Up Menu With Mexican Cauliflower Rice
text: Chipotle's (CMG) focus on plant-based menu innovation bodes well. The company initiates the piloting of Mexican Cauliflower Rice across restaurants in Arizona, California and Wisconsin.

title: Chipotle testing cauliflower rice in select locations after item drew in customers last year
text: Chipotle is bringing Mexican cauliflower rice to select restaurants in Arizona, Southern California and Wisconsin.

title: Buying This Stock Could Be the Smartest Thing You Ever Do
text: Investors can buy Chipotle's seemingly unstoppable growth at a significant discount.

title: Mexican Cauliflower Rice Debuts At Chipotle
text: Cauliflower rice has returned to some Chipotle locations

title: Chipotle testing Mexican cauliflower rice
text: Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc. CMG, +5.16% said Thursday that it's conducting a limited-time test on Mexican cauliflower rice at 60 restaurants in Arizona, Southern California, and Wisconsin. Chipotle tested cauliflower rice in 2020, and had cilantro-lime cauliflower rice on the menu last January.

title: CHIPOTLE TESTS MEXICAN CAULIFLOWER RICE
text: The new plant-based menu innovation is available in Arizona, California, and Wisconsin NEWPORT BEACH, Calif. , June 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) today announced it is piloting Mexican Cauliflower Rice at 60 restaurants in Arizona, Southern California, and Wisconsin for a limited time.

title: Chipotle (CMG) Boosts Digital Space With Loyalty Program Launch
text: Chipotle (CMG) strengthens accessibility in Canada with loyalty program launch and new restaurant opening.

title: 7 Best Stocks to Buy if You Are All About ESG Investing
text: While ESG investing pulls at the heartstrings, conscientious companies can also represent the best stocks to buy at this juncture. The post 7 Best Stocks to Buy if You Are All About ESG Investing appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Chipotle should see a margin benefit from greater avocado supply
text: Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc.'s CMG, -2.33% margins should improve in the second half of the year as the supply of avocados grows, easing the price for the key ingredient, according to a Truist Securities note. Analysts quote data from the Hass Avocado Board showing avocado shipments are expected to be up 2.1% in the third quarter after fewer shipments from Mexico in the first half.

title: CHIPOTLE EXPANDS DIGITAL ACCESS WITH LOYALTY PROGRAM LAUNCH IN CANADA
text: Chipotle Rewards means real food becomes real free real fast NEWPORT BEACH, Calif. , June 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG), today announced it has officially launched its loyalty program, Chipotle Rewards, in Canada.

title: Chipotle launches limited-time seasonal beverage
text: Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc. CMG, -1.23% announced the launch of Watermelon Limeade, its first seasonal beverage made in partnership with Tractor Beverage Co. The drink was tested in 2021 in Atlanta, Kansas City, and Orange County, Calif. before being added to menus.

title: CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL TO ANNOUNCE SECOND QUARTER 2022 RESULTS ON JULY 26, 2022
text: NEWPORT BEACH, Calif. , June 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) will host a conference call on Tuesday, July 26, 2022 at 4:30 PM Eastern time to discuss second quarter 2022 financial results and provide a business update for the 2022 third quarter to date.

title: Chipotle incentivizes executives to support farmers going organic — and it's upped the stakes
text: Chipotle's sustainability goals include improving diversity, equity, and inclusion, reducing emissions, and supporting farming communities transitioning to organic. It does this by tying outcomes to executive bonuses — and it's upped the stakes.

title: Chipotle and Kraft use this start-up to track and prove how green they are
text: HowGood is a startup that measures the environmental sustainability of thousands of ingredients that go into foods. Kraft Heinz is its latest client.

title: Buy Burritos with Bitcoin? Chipotle Now Accepts Cryptocurrencies
text: Chipotle now lets you pay with cryptocurrency through Flexa, a platform supporting bitcoin, ether, dogecoin and many other currencies.

title: Chipotle Adds Crypto Payment Acceptance Nationwide
text: Chipotle is going all in on cryptocurrencies. Pure-digital payments network Flexa announced in a Wednesday (June 1) Medium post that the fast-casual chain, which has more than 3,000 restaurants across five countries (and over 2,975 in the United States), has begun accepting digital currency payments at all U.S. locations exclusively through the company's network.

title: This Monster Dividend Stock Could Give Your Portfolio a Much-Needed Summer Vacation
text: Starbucks looks like a well-rounded buy, even if there's more pain in store for the stock market.

title: CHIPOTLE RETURNS TO THE BASKETBALL POSTSEASON, WILL HIDE UP TO 50,000 BOGOS IN ITS TV ADS
text: Chipotle Rewards members have a chance to score buy-one-get-one (BOGO) offers while watching the 2022 Men's Professional Basketball Championship Series NEWPORT BEACH, Calif. , June 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) today announced it is returning to the Men's Professional Basketball Championship Series to hide up to 50,000 buy-one-get-one (BOGO) deals in its TV ads.

title: At $1400, There's Upside For Chipotle Stock
text: After a 15% decline over the last six months, at the current price of around $1402 per share, we believe Chipotle Mexican Grill stock (NYSE: CMG), a fast-casual restaurant chain that focuses on fresh and organic ingredients in burritos, salads, and more - could see more gains.
